blended.narrative: Caberfae Peaks is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours. Looking ahead, 21 inches possible over the next 14 days. Mild temps with highs near 48°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Wednesday: 4" of snow, highs of 46°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Friday: 4" of snow, highs of 31°F. Expect variable conditions.
Sunday: 8" of heavy snow, highs of 29°F. Expect powder.
Monday: 2.1" of snow, highs of 24°F. Expect powder.
